mapper.select: SELECT * FROM quiz_scores WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND chapter_id = #{chapterId}
SELECT * FROM quiz_scores WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND quiz_id = #{quizId}
SELECT * FROM quiz_scores WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_correct = FALSE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quiz_scores WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quiz_scores WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_correct = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quiz_scores (user_id, chapter_id, quiz_id, user_answer, is_correct, score, submitted_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{chapterId}, #{quizId}, #{userAnswer}, #{isCorrect}, #{score}, #{submittedAt})

INSERT INTO quiz_scores (user_id, chapter_id, quiz_id, user_answer, is_correct, score, submitted_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{chapterId}, #{quizId}, #{userAnswer}, #{isCorrect}, #{score}, #{submittedAt}) ON CONFLICT (user_id, chapter_id, quiz_id) DO UPDATE SET user_answer = EXCLUDED.user_answer, is_correct = EXCLUDED.is_correct, score = EXCLUDED.score, submitted_at = NOW()
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM quiz_scores WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND chapter_id = #{chapterId}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(score), 0) FROM quiz_scores WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT chapter_id) FROM quiz_scores WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_correct = TRUE
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT chapter_id) FROM quiz_scores WHERE user_id = #{userId}
